Template for rendering mail with a placeholder for "foo".

# Purpose
The content `{{ foo}} Mail` is a template placeholder used in a templating system. The `{{ foo }}` syntax indicates a variable or expression that will be dynamically replaced with a specific value during the rendering process. This allows for the customization of the output, where `foo` is a variable that will be substituted with its corresponding value, followed by the word "Mail".
